name: Analytics
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Analytics is built to track the user behavior on your website or mobile app, or in nodejs, which is required by our machine learning and personalization algorithms."}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Integrate"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "🚧 Obtaining API Key", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Before you start, you need to get the API Key in order to get access to the API. You need to follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "[NO MATCH]", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "onboarding process"}]}, {"text": " or get the API key from your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/settings/integration", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": ""}]}], "appearance": "neutral"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Script Tag"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to use Analytics directly in the browser, you need to include the following script on the page:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "<!-- Findify Analytics --><script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@findify /analytics@latest /dist/findify-analytics.js\"></script>", "code": true}]}], "lang": "xml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Analytics will be available in the "}, {"text": "window", "code": true}, {"text": " object as "}, {"text": "window.FindifyAnalytics", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "NPM"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are using NPM, just install the library from our public NPM registry."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shell"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "npm i --save @findify /analytics"}]}], "lang": "ada"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Setup"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To start tracking events on the page, you need to initialize the analytics object. There can be only one instance of "}, {"text": "Analytics", "code": true}, {"text": ", so every next initialization will override the previous one."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JavaScript"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "var API_KEY ='YOUR_API_KEY';var Analytics = window.FindifyAnalytics;// Initialize Analyticsvar analyticsInstance = Analytics({ key: API_KEY });// Start sending eventsanalyticsInstance.sendEvent('click-item', { rid: REQUEST_ID, id: ITEM_ID });", "code": true}]}], "lang": "dart"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
